name: python3-docker
title: python3-docker
summary: Python 3 wrapper to access docker.io's control socket
description:
Python 3 wrapper to access docker.io's control socket
This package contains oodles of routines that aid in controlling
docker.io over it's socket control, the same way the docker.io
client controls the daemon.
.
This package provides Python 3 module bindings only.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-docker because Python 3 wrapper to access docker.io's control socket.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-docker as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-docker with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-docker --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
